lines.speaker: Nardok
lines.text: You ain't getting nuthin' off me, surface-dweller!

lines.speaker: Nardok
lines.text: Psst... wanna buy some weapons?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What have you got?

lines.speaker: Nardok
lines.text: Well, first up there's the normal bone club and bone spear. Good, solid frog-bone, and the spear has an iron tip. Can withstand a lot of punishment, if you know what I mean!

lines.speaker: Nardok
lines.text: But if you're after something a bit fancier, a bit more sophisticated, there's the bone crossbow and dagger.

lines.speaker: Nardok
lines.text: These are specially good for getting your prey unawares, but you're not going to get the best out of them unless you've been taught the special technique.

lines.speaker: Nardok
lines.text: So, you interested?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I might be.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is this special technique?

lines.speaker: Nardok
lines.text: Special aiming technique. If you hit an enemy with it their defence will get weaker so you can hit them again!

lines.speaker: Nardok
lines.text: Plus, if you use this technique on an enemy who isn't expecting it, you'll always hit them! Pretty good, eh?

lines.speaker: Nardok
lines.text: 'Course, there's only a few people who know it, so unless you can get someone to show you you won't be able to do it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Zanik showed me how to do it!

lines.speaker: Nardok
lines.text: Good for you! So, are you interested?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Nardok
lines.text: Yeah, you stay out of trouble.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why are you whispering?

lines.speaker: Nardok
lines.text: Well, y'know, it's not the most reputable profession, is it? Selling weapons?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why not?

lines.speaker: Nardok
lines.text: Well, they're used to hurt people, aren't they? That's not considered very, y'know, respectable. Even though the guards use them, and the hunters, they're still considered a bit, y'know, dirty.

lines.speaker: Nardok
lines.text: Isn't it like that where you come from?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, on the surface weapon-making is considered a noble profession.

lines.speaker: Nardok
lines.text: I don't know, you surface people are strange!
